recommendation.summary: Strong fit for production agentic AI systems role. AI resume directly maps to DataVisor's core mandates: LLM integration, agent orchestration, and real-time intelligent data pipelines.
key_strengths: LLM & Agent Architecture: Career-Ops pipeline demonstrates production agent systems with retry loops, structured schema enforcement, and token optimization via prompt caching. Maps directly to DataVisor's 'own and evolve internal AI agent workflows' requirement.
Semantic Search & High-Dimensional Data: PatentIQ's hybrid search combining OpenAI embeddings + PostgreSQL pgvector is exact pattern for their 'intelligence graph' architecture.
Real-Time Data Pipelines: Personify NLP feature extraction and Groundwork Redis caching (90% latency reduction, sub-200ms p99) show capability for 10,000+ TPS handling.
Python Production Engineering: Deep skills across semantic search, caching logic, query builders, and inference pipelines. R-CNN training pipeline shows ML systems thinking.
Cloud Infrastructure: EC2, Supabase, Docker, Kubernetes demonstrate familiarity with their stack.
experience_gaps: No explicit Spark, Kafka, Flink experience (not a hard blocker; semantic search + caching patterns show distributed thinking)
No domain-specific fraud/AML work (they noted this is a plus, not required)
recommendation.recommendation_tone: Apply with strong confidence. This is a genuine match, not a stretch. Lead with Career-Ops pipeline, PatentIQ semantic search, and Groundwork latency optimization.
